title: Mean Girls

characters.name: Cady Heron
characters.archetype: The new girl from Africa. Joins the Plastics as a project. Becomes one. Lindsay Lohan.

characters.name: Regina George
characters.archetype: Queen of the Plastics. Apex predator. 'I love your skirt — where did you get it?'

characters.name: Karen Smith
characters.archetype: The dim Plastic. 'I have ESPN or something.' Used as a weapon by Regina.

characters.name: Gretchen Wieners
characters.archetype: Father invented Toaster Strudel. Fetch. Loyal but increasingly paranoid.

characters.name: Janis
characters.archetype: Cady's first friend. Architect of the Regina takedown.

characters.name: Damian
characters.archetype: 'He's almost too gay to function.' Janis's bestie. Comedy gold.

characters.name: Aaron Samuels
characters.archetype: Regina's ex. Cady's crush. Hair like cool insulation.

characters.name: Ms. Norbury
characters.archetype: The Tina Fey character. Calc teacher. The voice of reason.

signature_quotes: Get in loser, we're going shopping.
I want my pink shirt back.
Stop trying to make fetch happen!
scenes: The Burn Book reveal in the gym.
off_screen_drama: The 2024 musical film reception was mixed.
Tina Fey's role as Ms. Norbury becoming meta over time.
